title: Rebrand: documentation-template → neura-knowledge-system
description: Project-wide rename and repositioning. Shift from 'docs framework' framing to 'knowledge + task system created and fine-tuned for AI.' Locks naming for the CLI binary, plugin, skills, marketplace listing, install URL, and downstream documentation. Prerequisite for any naming-locked subtask (notably the Method 1 CLI in 2026-04-26-framework-as-cli-tool/subtasks/03).
author: sidhantha
